title: Braised Chicken & Herby Couscous
summary: This recipe can be made using a third of your batch-cooked turmeric braised chicken. Plus, it's delicious.

method.description: Finely mince the coriander (stalks and all). Tip the couscous into a large heatproof bowl with a big pinch of salt. Pour over the boiling water, stir once, then cover with a plate and leave to steam for 10 mins.
Meanwhile, warm the Turmeric Braised Chicken in a saucepan set over a low heat, stirring occasionally, until piping hot. Add a splash of water if needed to loosen the sauce.
Fluff the couscous with a fork, then stir through the coriander, lemon zest and a drizzle of olive oil. Taste and season with salt and black pepper.
Spoon the couscous into bowls, top with the warm turmeric chicken and finish with a dollop of yoghurt.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
